commits.message: fix(seo): give /about, /terms, /privacy, /contact their own canonical signals
commits.author: shalombook

panels.title: Fix SEO: Unique Canonical URLs
panels.scene: A villager is chained to a giant stone tablet labeled 'DUPLICATE CONTENT'. The knight effortlessly snaps the chains with a flick of his wrist.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: I am free! The search engines finally see me!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Each page now has a proper canonical tag.

panels.title: The About page is real!
panels.scene: A villager stares in awe at a newly erected sign that reads '/about'. Angels descend from the heavens, playing harps.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: It exists! The mythical About page is real!

panels.title: Terms are clearly defined!
panels.scene: Two lawyers are dueling with swords over an ambiguous contract. The knight replaces the contract with a clearly written document. Lawyers hug and weep.

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Now each document has its own URL.

panels.title: 1 commit. 4 pages indexed. Sanity restored.
panels.scene: The knight is polishing his sword, looking bored. In the background, villagers are holding a parade with floats representing the /about, /terms, /privacy, and /contact pages.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We shall celebrate the uniqueness of our URLs!
